title.en: Man City agree record fee with Forest for Anderson
title.zh-CN: 曼城同意Forest为Anderson支付创纪录的费用

summary.en: Manchester City agree a club record deal with Nottingham Forest to sign England midfielder Elliot Anderson.
summary.zh-CN: 曼城与诺丁汉森林队达成了一项俱乐部纪录协议，签下英格兰中场球员埃利奥特·安德森。

title.en: Anderson's journey to England star and  potential record signing
title.zh-CN: 安德森的英格兰之旅和潜在的纪录签约

summary.en: Elliot Anderson has emerged as a key part of Thomas Tuchel's England side and is now on the brink of a big money move to Manchester City.
summary.zh-CN: 埃利奥特·安德森（ Elliot Anderson ）已经成为托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）英格兰队的关键组成部分，现在正处于向曼城转移大笔资金的边缘。

title.en: Ecuador stun Germany to qualify for knockout stages
title.zh-CN: 厄瓜多尔击晕德国以获得淘汰赛阶段的资格

summary.en: Goals from Nilson Angulo and Gonzalo Plata help Ecuador come from behind to beat Germany 2-1 to qualify for the knockout stages of the FIFA World Cup, as one of the top eight third-placed teams.
summary.zh-CN: 尼尔森·安古洛（ Nilson Angulo ）和贡萨洛·普拉塔（ Gonzalo Plata ）的进球帮助厄瓜多尔队以2比1击败德国队，有资格参加国际足联世界杯的淘汰赛阶段，成为排名前八的第三名球队之一。

title.en: Ivory Coast defeat Curacao to progress to knockout stages for first time
title.zh-CN: 科特迪瓦击败库拉索，首次进入淘汰赛阶段

summary.en: Ivory Coast ease past Curacao in their World Cup Group E clash courtesy of a Nicolas Pepe brace, confirming their qualification in the knockout stages of the competition for the first time in their...
summary.zh-CN: 象牙海岸在世界杯E组比赛中轻松超越库拉索，这是尼古拉斯·佩佩（ Nicolas Pepe ）支撑的礼貌，在他们的比赛中首次确认他们在淘汰赛阶段的资格......

title.en: Plata's 'touch of gold' gives Ecuador lead against Germany
title.zh-CN: 普拉塔的“触手可及的黄金”让厄瓜多尔领先德国

summary.en: Gonzalo Plata reacts quickest to direct Kevin Rodriuguez' flick on over Manuel Neuer, to give Ecuador a 2-1 lead over Germany in their FIFA World Cup Group E match at the New York New Jersey Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 冈萨洛·普拉塔（ Gonzalo Plata ）的反应最快，他指挥凯文·罗德里格斯（ Kevin Rodriuguez ）轻弹曼努埃尔·诺伊尔（ Manuel Neuer ） ，让厄瓜多尔在纽约新泽西体育场举行的国际足联世界杯E组比赛中以2比1领先德国。

title.en: Germany goal should have been ruled out for 'endangering opponent'
title.zh-CN: 德国的目标应该被排除在“危及对手”之外

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Joe Hart, Ellen White and Lucas Leiva explain why Alexander Pavlovic's high boot in the build-up to Leroy Sane's goal was an example of "endangering the opponent".
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育世界杯专家乔·哈特（ Joe Hart ）、艾伦·怀特（ Ellen White ）和卢卡斯·莱瓦（ Lucas Leiva ）解释了为什么亚历山大·巴甫洛维奇（ Alexander Pavlovic ）在为勒罗伊·萨内（ Leroy Sane ）的进球做准备时的高

title.en: 'Brilliant finish' - Pepe gets his second as Ivory Coast double their lead
title.zh-CN: “精彩收尾” -佩佩获得第二名，科特迪瓦的领先优势翻了一番

summary.en: Nicolas Pepe gets on the end of Ibrahima Sangare's "incisive pass" to score his second of the game, as Ivory Coast take a 2-0 lead against Curacao in their Group E match at Philadelphia Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 尼古拉斯·佩佩（ Nicolas Pepe ）结束了易卜拉希马·桑加雷（ Ibrahima Sangare ）的“精辟传球” ，在费城体育场（ Philadelphia Stadium ）的E组比赛中，科特迪瓦队以2比0领先库拉索（ Curacao ）。

title.en: Sane fires Germany ahead as Ecuador calls for foul waived away
title.zh-CN: 厄瓜多尔要求放弃犯规， SANE提前向德国开火

summary.en: Leroy Sane gives Germany a 1-0 lead against Ecuador in the second minute of the World Cup Group E match at the New York New Jersey Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 在纽约新泽西体育场举行的世界杯E组比赛的第二分钟， Leroy Sane让德国队以1-0领先厄瓜多尔。

title.en: The games that show the flaws in a 48-team World Cup
title.zh-CN: 显示48支球队世界杯缺陷的比赛

summary.en: Two matches in the final round of group games present the chance for two teams to simply play out a draw to qualify.
summary.zh-CN: 最后一轮小组赛中的两场比赛让两支球队有机会简单地进行抽签以获得资格。

title.en: Stay or go home? Tartan Army in limbo as Scotland await fate
title.zh-CN: 留下还是回家？苏格兰等待命运的格子呢军队陷入困境

summary.en: BBC Scotland examines options for the Tartan Army in Miami as Scotland wait to discover if their World Cup adventure will continue or not.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司苏格兰频道（ BBC Scotland ）调查了迈阿密的格子呢军队（ Tartan Army ）的选择，因为苏格兰正在等待他们的世界杯之旅是否会继续。

title.en: Are Scotland 'not good enough' to impress at World Cup?
title.zh-CN: 苏格兰是否“不够好” ，无法在世界杯上留下深刻印象？

summary.en: What is the mood among Scotland fans and pundits post-group stage at the World Cup?
summary.zh-CN: 苏格兰球迷和专家在世界杯小组赛后阶段的心情如何？

title.en: Is five-match ban for Qatar's Madibo excessive?
title.zh-CN: 卡塔尔马迪博的五场禁赛是否过度？

summary.en: Our Ask Me Anything team look at whether Madibo's punishment for his challenge on Kone was proportionate.
summary.zh-CN: 我们的Ask Me Anything团队看看Madibo对Kone的挑战的惩罚是否相称。

title.en: The Gakpo conundrum facing Liverpool

summary.en: Cody Gakpo is thriving with the Netherlands but increased competition means his Liverpool future is uncertain.
summary.zh-CN: Cody Gakpo在荷兰蓬勃发展，但竞争加剧意味着他的利物浦未来不确定。

title.en: Neymar - the return of Brazil's forgotten hero
title.zh-CN: 内马尔--被遗忘的巴西英雄的回归

summary.en: BBC Scotland's Scott Mullen delves into the return of Brazil's Neymar against Scotland.
summary.zh-CN: BBC苏格兰频道记者斯科特·马伦（ Scott Mullen ）深入探讨了巴西内马尔对苏格兰的回归。
